Welcome to Dr. Min Wang's Homepage

Min Wang, Ph.D
Applied Math PhD graduate | seeking a job requiring Tier 2 Visa Sponsor.
Department of Mathematics
University of Leicester, UK

Profile

Programming enthusiast with strong academic and professional experience researching and developing models analyzing pricing and risks of financial share prices. Hands-on experience researching and explaining model behavior, assessing risks, and analyzing financial reports. Demonstrated ability to teach complex concepts, provide guidance through research process, and debug analytics.
